task.title: Fix sidebar license metadata missing
task.goal: Restore license and related metadata display in the right sidebar node details without breaking existing download/like rendering.
constraints: Bootstrap through AgentKit before code changes
success_criteria: Right sidebar license metadata renders again when only fixed_license/compliance data is available

summaries.content: Task bootstrapped through AgentKit pipeline: Restore license and related metadata display in the right sidebar node details without breaking existing download/like rendering.
Sidebar license metadata restored by resolving license from tag, raw node data, or fixed_license/compliance fallback in the node details view-model path.

evidence_refs.note: Repository task registered and approved for implementation entry.
Selected-node and inheritance-chain license resolution now fall back to fixed_license/compliance data.
Chain highlight payload now uses the same license resolver.
